mapper.sql: from item i left join stock s on s.item_num = i.item_num left join bom b on b.item_num = i.item_num left join equipment_log e on e.item_num = i.item_num left join lot l on l.item_num = i.item_num
mapper.select: select i.name, l.lot_code, l.lot_date FROM lot l JOIN item i ON l.item_num = i.item_num
SELECT io.io_date, qc.qc_type, qc.qc_pass, item.name FROM io JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num ORDER BY io.io_date DESC

SELECT i.io_type, ii.name, f.facility_name, TO_CHAR(i.io_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS io_date FROM io i JOIN lot l ON l.lot_num = i.lot_num JOIN item ii ON ii.item_num = l.item_num JOIN facility f ON i.facility_num = f.facility_num ORDER BY i.io_num DESC
SELECT i.name, i.type, p.process_status FROM process p JOIN item i ON p.item_num = i.item_num WHERE i.TYPE IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT') ORDER BY i.item_num DESC
SELECT i.name, d.defect_qty, io.io_date FROM defective d JOIN io ON d.io_num = io.io_num JOIN lot l ON io.lot_num = l.lot_num JOIN item i ON l.item_num = i.item_num ORDER BY io.io_date DESC
SELECT i.code, i.name, e.equip_status, e.total_runtime FROM EQUIPMENT_LOG e JOIN item i ON e.item_num = i.item_num ORDER BY e.MAINTENANCE_DATE DESC
SELECT i.code, i.name, e.equip_status, e.total_runtime FROM EQUIPMENT_LOG e JOIN item i ON e.item_num = i.item_num ORDER BY e.MAINTENANCE_DATE DESC
